description:
Context:
    You are acting as a QA-automation engineer who has just received a sample execution log that you must triage for critical problems before handing it to the developers.  
    The sample log already exists on the system at  
    /home/user/qa_logs/application.log  

    Your goal is to:
    1. Extract every line whose severity tag is either “[ERROR]” or “[WARN]” (case-sensitive, exact match of the whole token, including the square brackets).  
    2. Preserve the original line order exactly as it appears in application.log.  
    3. Write those lines to a new file called /home/user/qa_logs/critical.log.  
    4. Create a two-line summary file called /home/user/qa_logs/critical_summary.txt using this exact format:  

       ERROR: <integer_count_of_error_lines>  
       WARN: <integer_count_of_warn_lines>  

       • There must be no leading or trailing spaces.  
       • The colon is followed by a single space, then the count.  
       • The first line must be about ERROR, the second about WARN.  
       • A terminating newline at the end of the second line is required.  

    Success criteria checked by the automated grader:
    • /home/user/qa_logs/critical.log exists and contains ONLY the original “[ERROR]” and “[WARN]” lines, in their original order.  
    • /home/user/qa_logs/critical_summary.txt exists and follows the two-line format above with the correct counts.  
    • No other files in /home/user/qa_logs are modified.  

    You can solve this in any way you like (e.g., using grep, awk, sed, or a small shell script), but keep the whole solution to a simple sequence of 3–4 logical shell commands.
truth:
# Pre-existing directory and file:
    Directory: /home/user/qa_logs  
    File: /home/user/qa_logs/application.log  
    Contents of application.log (10 lines with final newline):

2024-06-01 10:00:00 [INFO] Starting application
2024-06-01 10:00:01 [DEBUG] Initializing modules
2024-06-01 10:00:02 [WARN] Deprecated API used
2024-06-01 10:00:03 [INFO] Module A ready
2024-06-01 10:00:04 [ERROR] Null pointer exception
2024-06-01 10:00:05 [WARN] Low disk space
2024-06-01 10:00:06 [DEBUG] Cache cleared
2024-06-01 10:00:07 [ERROR] Out of memory
2024-06-01 10:00:08 [INFO] Shutdown requested
2024-06-01 10:00:09 [WARN] Configuration file missing

    # Expected artefacts after agent completion:

    1. /home/user/qa_logs/critical.log  
       Expected content (exactly 5 lines, each ending with '\n'):

2024-06-01 10:00:02 [WARN] Deprecated API used
2024-06-01 10:00:04 [ERROR] Null pointer exception
2024-06-01 10:00:05 [WARN] Low disk space
2024-06-01 10:00:07 [ERROR] Out of memory
2024-06-01 10:00:09 [WARN] Configuration file missing

    2. /home/user/qa_logs/critical_summary.txt  
       Expected content (two lines, each ending with '\n'):

ERROR: 2
WARN: 3

    # No other files should be added, changed, or removed inside /home/user/qa_logs.
name: task_000000_4300d51b
